focus: Arena Field Edition — set up cosign-keyless signing of the proven-matrix images (deploy/field-edition/cosign/{sign,verify}-proven-matrix.sh + README), ready for the operator to ARM (§9/M3). It's the one piece of distribution execution Spark still owed; keyless signing needs an interactive GitHub-OIDC browser flow only the operator can do (auth as orionfold), so everything up to that boundary is built + smoked and the arm is one command (--install-cosign --sign). Scope is derived live from fieldkit so it never drifts from compose.py: signs only Orionfold-built GHCR digest-pinned images — today exactly the CUDA-13 lane (sha256:93993cc2…); correctly skips pgvector (upstream) + the NIM embedder (NVIDIA); auto-includes cortex-embedder at v1.1. Verified the derived set is byte-identical to the embedded fallback. sign defaults to DRY-RUN (smoked green); after --sign it reads the signer identity back from the minted cert and records it to signed-identity.env (the public identity verify must pin); verify runs the exact pinned cosign-verify the installer's LiveUpdateChannel.verify_signature mirrors at M3. Not a first-boot blocker (pulls work unsigned). No version bump / no website rebuild / no fieldkit release. Earlier same session: get.orionfold.com bootstrap script delivered (the install entry point).
next: OPERATOR ARM: cd deploy/field-edition/cosign && ./sign-proven-matrix.sh --install-cosign --sign (keyless GitHub-OIDC as orionfold) → commit signed-identity.env → then wire LiveUpdateChannel.verify_signature to the pinned cosign verify (M3 channel live)
